name: HashA2A Intelligence Oracle
description: Agent-to-Agent data marketplace. Sells verified multi-oracle prices, prediction market intelligence, cross-oracle arbitrage signals, and deep research to AI agents. Pay per query via USDC (x402/AP2) or HBAR (HIP-991). Fully A2A-compatible with task lifecycle management.

skills.name: Verified Price Feed
skills.description: Returns a cross-verified price for any asset from multiple independent oracles (Pyth, CoinGecko, DeFiLlama/Chainlink). Includes spread analysis and confidence scoring.

asset.description: Asset symbol, e.g. BTC/USD, ETH/USD, XAU/USD

source.description: Optional: filter to one oracle (pyth, coingecko, defillama)

prices.description: Array of {source, price, confidence} from each oracle

spread_pct.description: Price spread across oracles as percentage

skills.name: Cross-Oracle Arbitrage Scan
skills.description: Scans all tracked assets for price discrepancies across oracles. Returns ranked opportunities with buy/sell recommendations.

signals.description: Ranked arbitrage signals with asset, spread, buy_from, sell_to

skills.name: Prediction Market Data
skills.description: Fetches prediction market data from Polymarket, Kalshi, PredictIt, or Manifold. Returns probabilities, volumes, and liquidity.

markets.description: Array of markets with outcomes, prices, volume, liquidity

skills.name: Deep Research
skills.description: Performs comprehensive research using web search, news, social signals, and prediction market data combined with AI analysis. Premium intelligence product.

sources.description: Web, news, and market sources consulted

skills.name: Create A2A Task
skills.description: Creates a new task for asynchronous processing. Supports full lifecycle: submitted → working → input-required → completed/failed.

context_id.description: Optional context ID for grouping interactions

schemes.name: Authorization
schemes.description: Ephemeral JWT tokens for stateless authentication. Tokens expire in 5 minutes.
All queries are payment-gated via x402 (USDC) or HIP-991 (HBAR). No API key required.

token.description: Request ephemeral JWT token for authenticated requests

mandates.description: AP2 cryptographic mandates for autonomous agent spending. Agents can pre-authorize spending limits.

security.message_integrity: SHA-256 proofs via HCS audit topic
